title: The Little Fish and His Horse Friend
style: whimsical watercolor children's animation, soft fantasy, warm pastel palette, gentle lighting, cinematic depth

little_fish.visual: small colorful fish with soft blue and turquoise tones, fluid graceful movement, expressive eyes

horse_friend.visual: friendly horse with warm brown tones, soft features, calm presence near the water’s edge

visual_motifs.water_health: water starts clear and vibrant, becomes cloudy and dull, then returns to clean and lively
visual_motifs.connection: ripples in water reflect emotional connection between fish and horse

recurring_phrase: Water is life, we must take care of it.

scenes.description: A bright, clear river under morning light. The little fish swims happily while the horse drinks water by the shore.
scenes.camera: Wide establishing shot, gentle pan across river and shore
scenes.animation: Sparkling water, soft reflections, smooth swimming motion
scenes.narration: In a clear river, the little fish swam happily, and his horse friend stayed close by the shore.

scenes.description: The fish playfully jumps out of the water, greeting the horse.
scenes.camera: Medium shot, slight upward motion following the fish jump
scenes.animation: Water splash particles, horse reacts gently
scenes.narration: Hello, my friend! The water feels wonderful today.

scenes.description: The horse smiles and looks at the river.
scenes.camera: Close-up on horse, soft background blur
scenes.narration: The horse nodded. This river gives us life.

scenes.description: Leaves and small debris begin to float into the water.
scenes.camera: Wide shot slowly tightening on polluted area
scenes.animation: Water loses clarity slightly, floating particles increase
scenes.narration: But one day, something changed. The water was not as clear.

scenes.description: The fish looks worried as the water becomes cloudy.
scenes.animation: Fish slows movement, particles in water drift around
scenes.narration: The little fish felt uneasy. It was harder to see and breathe.

scenes.description: The horse notices and steps closer to the river, concerned.
scenes.animation: Horse leans in, ears slightly lowered
scenes.narration: The horse looked closely. The river needs help.

scenes.description: They begin to act together—horse clearing debris near shore, fish guiding movement in water.
scenes.animation: Debris slowly moves away, coordinated actions
scenes.narration: Together, they worked carefully. Little by little, they helped the river.

scenes.description: The water begins to clear, light returns beneath the surface.
scenes.camera: Wide shot with light rays entering water
scenes.animation: Particles fade, colors become vibrant again
scenes.narration: The water slowly became clear again. Water is life, we must take care of it.

scenes.description: The fish swims energetically again while the horse watches happily.
scenes.narration: The little fish smiled. The river was alive again.

scenes.description: Sunset over the river, both friends resting peacefully.
scenes.camera: Wide cinematic shot, slow fade out
scenes.animation: Warm sunset tones, calm water reflections
scenes.narration: And from that day on, they cared for their home. Water is life, we must take care of it.
